elementor-widget-container: Welcome to , where purpose-driven business meets bold ambition. We are a Nepal-based collective building pathways from local innovation to global opportunity—through transformative consulting, meaningful travel experiences, and sustainable development. At our core, we believe in doing business that uplifts people, protects the planet, and redefines what’s possible from Nepal.
elementor-widget-container 3: At Salt Route Group, we envision a Nepal where businesses are not only profitable but deeply responsible—where young people can find purpose at home, and where local enterprises thrive on the global stage. We are committed to building ventures that reflect our values and deliver impact with integrity.
elementor-heading-title 5: We operate with honesty, fairness, and a deep respect for human dignity in everything we do.
elementor-heading-title 7: We believe diversity is strength—and we strive to create inclusive spaces that value every voice.
elementor-heading-title 9: Environmental stewardship guides our strategies, decisions, and long-term goals.
elementor-heading-title 11: We prioritize local employment, uplift communities, and reinvest in the ecosystems that support us.

elementor-widget-container: From pre-opening strategy to ongoing operational support, SRC works alongside property owners and investors to shape distinctive, profitable, and responsible hospitality brands. Our solutions are grounded in local insight and driven by global standards.
elementor-widget-container 2: From curated stays to thematic experiences, we offer end-to-end travel design that honors local heritage, supports community businesses, and redefines how Nepal is explored.
elementor-heading-title 4: Salt Route Consulting is the strategic arm of Salt Route Group, helping hospitality businesses unlock value through smart operations, sustainable practices, and people-first management. We specialize in building strong foundations for long-term success.
elementor-heading-title 8: Nestled in the hills, this property combines luxury, comfort, and the cultural charm of Nepal.
elementor-heading-title 10: An upcoming property celebrating the rich biodiversity and heritage of Nepal’s southern plains.
elementor-heading-title 12: Opening soon, this property offers breathtaking views and authentic Himalayan hospitality, perfect for adventurous travelers and serene retreats.​
elementor-heading-title 16: Salt Route Experiences is your gateway to immersive, responsible travel. We design journeys that connect travelers to the landscapes, cultures, and communities of Nepal—with care, authenticity, and purpose.
elementor-heading-title 19: We’re developing a growing portfolio of experience-based tourism products, from nature trails and cultural circuits to community-based travel hubs. Our focus remains on low-impact, high-value experiences that leave a lasting mark—for both traveler and host.

elementor-heading-title 3: We view sustainability not as a checklist, but as a responsibility. Our approach is holistic—embedding environmental care, social equity, and ethical governance into the heart of every project. Whether consulting on a new hotel or curating a travel experience, we ensure our impact creates long-term value for people, places, and the planet.
elementor-heading-title 5: Through tourism and hospitality, we create jobs, boost local businesses, and promote cultural heritage.
